items.name_cn:
【Highest Market Version, Welcome to Compare】
RIDER Backpack
Beige Dior Oblique Jacquard
Beige Rider Backpack made of Dior Oblique jacquard accented with calfskin. Made of classic pattern and lightweight jacquard material that contrasts with the casual design, it can be easily used as a daily item. Spacious internal storage can hold a 15-inch laptop, documents, iPad, etc. The single front zipper pocket allows for easy storage and retrieval of wallets, phones, earphones, keys, and other personal items.
Beige Dior Oblique jacquard with leather piping

Handbag or shoulder carry

items.name_cn:
【Highest version real leather top-tier replica with full retail packaging】MCM Aren Visetos
Money Bucket Bag
Exclusive®️ Cognac Monogram
This cylindrical crossbody bag has ample space💯 featuring a geometric construction design, adorned with a Visetos classic print and a vintage gold-tone logo plaque, two brand signature elements. The bag top is made of Nappa leather, with a double-zipper closure to ensure the safety of your belongings, and an expandable fabric lining inside to store your valuables. You can carry this cylindrical crossbody bag by its top leather handle, or pair it with the included strap for mobility.
Model: MWBBAER01CO001
Dimensions: 16*14*16cm
Strap: Removable chain strap
Closure: Double-zipper closure
Color: Cognac/Brown
